tree.name: Herbert Jones
tree.note: Alabama forward; drafted 35th overall by New Orleans using pick acquired from Atlanta

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#35)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NOP traded Solomon Hill, draft rights to De'Andre Hunter (#4) and Jordan Bone, and a 2023 2nd round pick to ATL for draft rights to Jaxson Hayes, Nickeil Alexander-Walker, Marcos Louzada Silva, and 2021 and 2022 2nd round picks
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally CLE's pick, traded to ATL in Kyle Korver deal (Jan 2017), then ATL to NOP in De'Andre Hunter draft night trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#4)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NOP traded Anthony Davis to LAL for Brandon Ingram, Lonzo Ball, Josh Hart, 2019 1st (#4), 2021 1st (swap), 2024 1st (#17, Dalton Knecht), and 2025 1st (#16, Yang Hansen)
assetsGivenUp.note: LAL's 2019 1st round pick from AD trade, used to draft De'Andre Hunter, then traded to ATL

assetsGivenUp.name: Anthony Davis
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky forward, 2012 #1 overall pick by New Orleans
